description: Shen-PPT editable four-page sample deck library. Each style contains cover, directory, section divider, and body pages.

general.description: General academic, engineering, education, business, and technology presentation skins.

styles.name: Academic Minimal
styles.useFor: clean academic reports, paper reading, thesis progress

styles.name: Business Roadshow
styles.useFor: project proposals, productized research, entrepreneurship reports

styles.name: Chinese Academic
styles.useFor: formal Chinese academic defenses and course reports

styles.name: Dark Engineering
styles.useFor: engineering projects, code reports, experiment systems

styles.name: Data Analytics
styles.useFor: data results, charts, model evaluation, dashboards

styles.name: Education Clean
styles.useFor: course defense, teaching report, student project presentation

styles.name: Research Blue
styles.useFor: research talks, group meetings, technical route planning

styles.name: Tech Launch
styles.useFor: software systems, demos, product-oriented engineering projects

tongji.description: Tongji-specific editable sample decks with fixed school-logo placement and campus/template-derived visual language.

styles.name: Tongji Green Academic
styles.useFor: formal Tongji academic reports with green visual tone

styles.name: Tongji Green Vitality
styles.useFor: course projects, student innovation, vivid campus tone

styles.name: Tongji Sakura
styles.useFor: soft campus-style academic or course reports

styles.name: Tongji Study Space
styles.useFor: library, learning-space, teaching, and study reports
